app.languageDesc: Choose the display language for the app

updates.channelLockedNote: You can't change channels while updating.
updates.channelDescription: The stable channel only gets updates after testing. Beta may contain bugs.
updates.macUnsignedNote: Auto-updates don't work on macOS yet because the app isn't code-signed. Download the latest version manually from GitHub Releases or Discord.
updates.downgradeWarning: This is a <1>downgrade</1> — installing it will replace your current library with an older format. Make sure you have a backup.

status.awaitingArtifacts: Release is uploading — download will start automatically.
status.errorReleasePending: Release in progress — try again in a moment.

card.title: Notifications
card.subtitle: Stay informed about new episodes and live airings.

enabled.title: Episode notifications
enabled.description: Send a notification when a new episode of a tracked anime airs.

leadTime.title: Notify before airing
leadTime.description: How many minutes before airing to send the notification

quietHours.title: Quiet hours
quietHours.description: Pause notifications during the selected hours

useSystemSound.title: System sound
useSystemSound.description: Play a sound when a new notification arrives.

notifications.windowsInfo: On Windows, when the app is closed, upcoming notifications are scheduled by a background PowerShell command. <1>You don't need to do anything.</1>

subscriptions.title: Subscriptions
subscriptions.subtitle: Anime you want to receive notifications for.
subscriptions.empty: No subscriptions. Add an anime from the schedule by clicking the bell icon.

profileCard.title: Profile
profileCard.subtitle: The name used in the new-tab greeting. Stays on this device.

displayName.title: Your name
displayName.description: Leave empty and Shiro will use your AniList nickname (if linked).

appCard.title: General app settings
appCard.subtitle: App behaviour at system startup and during data refresh.

autoLaunch.title: Launch at system startup
autoLaunch.description: Automatically open ShiroAni after you log in.

feedRefreshOnStartup.title: Refresh RSS at app startup
feedRefreshOnStartup.description: When off, news only loads when you visit the News view or refresh manually. Takes effect on next launch.

general.restartCallout: Some system changes require restarting the app. <1>Your data is safe.</1>

readability.title: Readability
readability.subtitle: Tune the text and UI scale to your screen.
readability.macHint: On macOS, 105–110% usually works best, especially on Retina displays.

palette.title: Color theme
palette.subtitle: Pick a palette: your own or from the library.

deleteDialog.title: Delete theme?
deleteDialog.description: Theme "{{label}}" will be permanently deleted. This cannot be undone.

invalidField.format: Unsupported theme file format or version
invalidField.theme: The file contains no theme data
invalidField.name: The theme has no valid name

editor.editDescription: Change settings for your custom theme
editor.name: Name

system.title: System
system.subtitle: Match the light or dark theme to your OS setting

card.title: App background
card.subtitle: Set a custom image or GIF as the interface background.

position.title: Dock position
position.subtitle: Pick a screen edge. The preview on the right reacts to changes.
position.edgeDescription: Which screen edge to pin the dock to.
position.resetDescription: Restore the dock to the centre of the edge if you dragged it away.

behavior.title: Behaviour
behavior.subtitle: How the dock reacts to the cursor and whether you can move it.

autoHide.title: Auto-hide
autoHide.description: Dock collapses to an icon and expands when you hover.

showLabels.title: Show labels
showLabels.description: Display names under the navigation icons.

draggable.title: Draggable
draggable.description: Allow moving the dock by dragging.

card.title: View visibility
card.subtitle: Hide sections you don't use. Settings is always available.

views.reorderHint: Drag the handle to reorder icons in the dock.
views.resetDescription: Restore the default icon order and show every section again.

card.title: New tab page
card.subtitle: Show or hide panels and set their order.

newtab.reorderHint: Drag the handle to reorder panels.

watermark.title: Kanji watermark
watermark.description: Show the decorative kanji glyph in the background.

greetingName.title: Show name in greeting
greetingName.description: Display the name next to the greeting on the new tab page.

newtab.resetDescription: Restore the default order and show every panel.

card.title: Ad blocking
card.subtitle: Built-in ad blocker for the ShiroAni browser.

adblock.toggleDescription: Block ads in the built-in browser (EasyList + EasyPrivacy)
adblock.emptyExceptions: No exceptions. Ads are blocked on every site.
adblock.exceptionsHint: Adblock is disabled on the listed domains. Cosmetic filters still apply.

card.title: Pop-ups
card.subtitle: Control pop-up windows opened by sites.

popups.toggleDescription: OAuth windows (Google, Discord) are always allowed.

tabs.splitDescription: Drag a tab onto another to open them side by side.

card.title: Progress tracking
card.subtitle: Automatically update your library watch progress.

tracking.toggleDescription: When you watch an anime from your library on a streaming site, updates the episode number. Progress only advances — it never goes backwards.

card.title: Web browser
card.subtitle: General behaviour of the built-in browser.

general.description: ShiroAni uses an embedded Chromium. Browsing data is stored locally and never leaves your device.

main.title: Discord Rich Presence
main.subtitle: Connect to Discord and show your activity to friends.
main.showDetailsDescription: Display the watching anime title on Discord.
main.showTimeDescription: Show how many minutes you've been watching.
main.useTemplatesDescription: Customize the status text for each activity

preview.title: Preview
preview.subtitle: How your status will look on Discord.

editor.title: Status templates
editor.subtitle: Edit the text for each activity type

discord.info: Discord status only works while the Discord client is running on your computer. Friends will see what you're doing in ShiroAni on your Discord profile.

card.title: Desktop mascot
card.subtitle: Animated chibi mascot on your desktop with a system tray icon.

sprite.title: Custom sprite
sprite.description: PNG, JPG, GIF or WEBP · max 10 MB · 2048×2048 px. Animated GIFs render as a single frame.

scaleMode.title: Sprite scaling
scaleMode.description: How to fit the image into the square mascot window

visibility.title: Visibility mode
visibility.description: When the mascot should appear on the desktop

lock.title: Lock position
lock.description: Prevent accidental dragging of the mascot.

animation.title: Mascot animation
animation.description: Soft up-down sway. Disable to keep the mascot still.

resetPosition.title: Reset position
resetPosition.description: Move the mascot back to its default spot (bottom-right corner)

card.title: Export data
card.subtitle: Save all app data to a JSON file.

card.title: Import data
card.subtitle: Load data from a JSON file.

import.warning: <1>Heads up:</1> import will overwrite existing data. It's best to export a backup first.

danger.title: Delete all data
danger.subtitle: Permanently deletes all data — cannot be undone.
danger.description: You'll lose your library, diary, subscriptions and settings. This can't be undone.

confirm.title: Delete all data?
confirm.description: This action is permanent. Type the word below to confirm.
confirm.warning: You'll erase your library, diary, subscriptions, browsing history & bookmarks, all settings, and the built-in browser session (cookies and saved logins). The app will restart as if freshly installed.
confirm.warningWeb: You'll erase all ShiroAni data stored in this browser — your library, diary, subscriptions and settings — and the app will reload.
confirm.error: Couldn't delete all data. Please try again.

about.tagline: Browser · anime tracker in one place
about.onboardingHint: After clicking, the wizard launches right away and Shiro-chan walks you through it again!

story.title: Story
story.subtitle: From the author. I just wanted an app like this.
story.p1: I built ShiroAni because I wanted everything for watching anime in one place. <1>Browser, library, schedule, diary</1>, just one cosy place.
story.p2: Over time I kept adding more: mascots, themes, notifications, and I had a great time doing it. At some point I thought: why not share it with others?
story.p3: The idea is for everyone to have their own, fun way to watch anime. And to chat about favourite series with others, in a great <1>community</1>.

logs.title: App logs
logs.subtitle: Open the app log folder in your file explorer.

card.title: Support ShiroAni
card.subtitle: If the app makes your anime nights nicer.
card.p1: I build ShiroAni solo, in my free time, after work. Every theme, mascot and little detail is something I added because I wanted it to exist.
card.p2: The app is free and always will be. But if it's become part of your routine and you'd like to say thanks, you can <1>buy me a coffee</1>, it genuinely keeps me motivated to keep building.
card.p3: No pressure either way. Just having you here using it already means a lot.

card.title: Developer mode
card.subtitle: Debugging tools. Useful when reporting a bug or peeking under the hood.

developer.toggleDescription: Enables DevTools, log viewer, and diagnostics export.

logs.title: Log viewer
logs.descriptionBuffer: Last {{count}} {{entries}} from the app buffer. Stored only in memory, never sent anywhere.
logs.descriptionTruncated: Showing the last {{limit}} of {{total}} entries from the file.
logs.logsUnavailable: Log file access is unavailable in this environment.

card.title: App family
card.subtitle: Other small apps I make. Maybe you'll find something useful. They're all free.

shiranami.description: A calm player for your local library: playlists, internet radio, synced lyrics, and YouTube downloads. Perfect in the background while watching an episode or catching up on manga.
shiranami.previewAlt: Library view in the Shiranami app

kireimanga.description: A comfy reader with a chapter library, bookmarks, import, and night mode. Your series wait in one quiet place.
kireimanga.previewAlt: Library view in the KireiManga app
